race.comment: FLYING BILLIE (3) is a progressive type in form including an all-the-way win in tougher class latest. More weight this time but has a low draw, aided by the claim and will take catching again. VERBANO (7) returns from a two-start stint in Victoria and is well placed this class. The soft track suits and best figures stack up. Expecting big improvement. DANCING WOLF (8) finished fifth last start over 1150m at Devonport Synthetic after racing on the pace for much of the way. Sure to give a sight. GEEGEE STRAWBERRY (12) knuckled down strongly when finished 1.75 lengths from the winner here. Will be winding up strongly again.
